515b6(ma'o): parng mdza / ba gor mkhas pa rin chin blo gsal gyis/ rgya mar rgya nag yul kun rnam par bgro / lha bdag sngags dro legs tang mang po la/ phyi nang gsang ba'i bon go mang du zhus/ gtsang ma bod kyi rnad du /

516a2(ma'o): brtsegs nas/ lha re gyang ma gyang tho' rtse du bbs/ lha sras rgyal po'i nang ba mgru bar byas/ de ltar mtho ba khyung lung ngal mkhar nas// la' ba thel le rgya thar yan chad du/ thon gyi 'du gnas sum rcu rtsa bdun / 
516a3(ma'o): dang / du lagg gu segs gsas khang grangs su 'phel/ grub thob mkhas pa bua ma che drug dang / gdung rgyung bcu gsum mkhas pa chen po gru/ lo paNa gshen brgyang mthuo bo che ming gru/ ben chen mkhas pa nyi bu /
